title: P1 — proposal_inventory_init bootstrap (schema seed)
rationale: Bootstrap state/proposals/ stack so future ideas accumulate as schema-valid proposal cards instead of spawning modules ad hoc (spec §1, §2, §15).
estimated_impact: unblocks P2-P9 (every later tool reads state/proposals/ — no infra means no proposal stack).
user_decision_reason: heuristic: loss_free=true, risk=low, score=95>=40; seed/bootstrap already implemented as proposal_inventory_init.hexa — doc verdict: archive (user will run archive step manually)
